Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Do you think Iskcon leaders handle it well in Puris Pandas dispute?

Social · asked by user [] · 2008-11-15 · 4 answers
It does look like a bad PR with all the "petitions and personal complain" requests?
user [33] · 2008-11-15
I dont see where Iskcon leaders have done anything.
user [265] · 2008-11-17
That is what happens when Iskcon leaders are not sensitive to local concerns.
user [2] · 2008-11-17
local leaders can approach and solve local issues, concentrated power and international management of local issues v'eda proxies as in corporate style, is disastrous rajo-guna
user [352] · 2008-12-08
Often devotees have no reply to the Puri priests and Orissan peoples arguments about why ISKCON holds Rathayatra on a different day to the traditional date
If anyone has a copy of the Sri Krishna Kathamrita Magazine(Vol 3 No 1 pub. Gopaljiu Publications ) called The Confidential meaning of Rathayatra there is an interesting lecture by Srila Gour Govinda Maharaja in which the question about why Rathayatra can be performed on any day is answered (it starts on p17).
